summary.headline: Professional Multi-Asset Market Terminal Enhanced v2 with Cryptobible
summary.subheadline: Advanced market analysis with liquidity heatmaps, order flow, and three-layer framework
version_history: v2.01: Enhanced features and cron integration
v2.02: Analyst-style narrative layer and richer structure analytics
v2.03: Live macro market context integrated into analytics layer
v2.04: Advisory bridge pass, broader asset sync, and consistency fixes
v2.05: Canonical signal/advisory pipeline shared with dashboard-data
v2.06: Derivatives panels, fallback-resilient price mapping, and reader-facing update log

executive_summary: Breadth is constructive: 9 assets are green against 8 red, so weakness is not yet broad enough to call fully defensive participation.
Relative strength is concentrated in CRUDE (+12.14%), while VIX remains the weakest tape (-11.43%).
Macro context shows equities 3/3 positive, defensive metals 0/2 positive, with crude at +12.14%.
liquidity_story: Liquidity mapping is now actionable rather than placeholder-level: 8 support clusters, 8 resistance clusters, and 83 high-interest zones are active in the current snapshot.
The lead liquidity reference is BTC swing low around 74938.15, tagged as external liquidity and worth treating as a reaction-or-sweep reference.
order_flow_story: Order-flow proxies read as buyer-led: bid/ask imbalance is +0.19, maker pressure is 0.59, and taker activity is 0.41.
The strongest recent structural participation shows up in BTC, where the model tags a bullish profile with Sweeps: 10, OBs: 0, FVGs: 10.
structure_story: The dominant structural backdrop is macro_context_only, with 1 breakout markers and 4 consolidation references feeding the map.
Participant behavior reads medium on the institutional side and neutral on the retail side, while the psychological layer leans bullish with fear/greed near 13.
risk_story: Portfolio-level risk proxies place 95% VaR near 8.81 and max observed drawdown near 12.14%.
Highest caution is warranted in: CRUDE, VIX.
Sizing logic still favors reduced exposure in: BTC, ETH, SOL, ZEC, GOLD, SILVER, CRUDE, SPX, NDX, DJI, DXY, VIX, USD, EUR, TRY.
